Ω : Type u_2
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
ι : Type u_4
inst✝⁶ : PartialOrder ι
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : FirstCountableTopology ι
inst✝² : InfSet ι
inst✝¹ : Bot ι
inst✝ : CompactIccSpace ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
τ : ℕ → Ω → WithTop ι
X : ι → Ω → ℝ
hX1 : Adapted 𝓕 X
hX2 : ∀ (ω : Ω), RightContinuous fun x => X x ω
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ IsLocalizingSequence 𝓕 (fun n => hittingAfter X (Set.Ici ↑n) ⊥) P

by

by

    by_contra h

    have : X s ω ≤ C := le_trans (le_abs_self _) (hC s ⟨hs.1, hs.2.le⟩)
    linarith [Nat.le_ceil C]
